sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: ILLINOIS TOOL WORKS INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: Q1 2026 매출 40억 2,000만 달러(전년비 5% 증가), GAAP EPS 2.66달러(전년비 12% 증가)
영업마진 25.4%(전년비 60포인트 개선), Enterprise Initiatives가 마진 개선에 주도적으로 기여

riskChanges.text: 관세 등 거시환경 불확실성에도 불구하고 '어떤 환경에서도 강건한 성과 달성' 가능한 비즈니스 모델 강조 — 수요 둔화 리스크 모니터링 필요

businessChanges.text: Enterprise Initiatives(기업효율화) 전략이 영업마진 개선에 주도적으로 기여하며 핵심 성장 동력으로 작동
유기적 성장 4.6%, 가격 기여 0.4%, 외환 효과 (3.9%)로 구성된 매출 성장 구조
영업현금흐름 6억 2,300만 달러, 잉여현금흐름 5억 2,800만 달러 — 순이익의 69% 전환율

financialHighlights.text: 매출 40억 2,000만 달러(전년비 5% 증가), GAAP EPS 2.66달러(12% 증가)
주주환원 3억 7,500만 달러(배당금 0.10달러 포함), 연간 EPS 가이던스 11.10~11.50달러
FY2026 가이던스: 연간 매출 15억 달러 수준 유지, 영업마진 26.5~27.5% 목표(전년비 약 100포인트 개선)

watchItems.text: 잉여현금흐름이 순이익의 100% 초과 달성 목표 — FY2026 전체 전환율 추이 모니터링
관세 등 외환·거시 역풍 속 유기적 성장률 4.6% 지속 여부가 핵심 변수

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a20260331-1q26ex991pressre.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 ITW Reports First Quarter 2026 Results • Revenue of $4.02 billion, an increase of 5% • Operating margin of 25.4%, an increase of 60 bps, as Enterprise Initiatives contributed 120 bps • GAAP EPS of $2.66, an increase of 12% • Full Year 2026 GAAP EPS guidance raised by $0.10 to a range of $11.10 to $11.50 GLENVIEW, IL., April 30, 2026 - Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) today reported its first quarter 2026 results and raised full year 2026 GAAP EPS guidance. “ITW delivered a solid start to the year, marked by five percent revenue growth, margin expansion of 60 basis points to 25.4 percent, and a 12 percent increase in GAAP earnings per share to $2.66. Positive demand trends continued in our capex-related  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.02 billion = 40억 2,000만 달러; $4.02 = 4.02달러; $2.66 = 2.66달러; $0.10 = 0.10달러; $11.10 = 11.10달러; $11.50 = 11.50달러; 25.4 percent = 25.4%; 12 percent = 12%; 60 basis points = 60포인트.

five percent, respectively, this quarter,” said Christopher A. O’Herlihy, President and Chief Executive Officer. “As we move forward, ITW’s unique and resilient business model and ‘Do What We Say’ execution ensure that we are primed to deliver robust financial performance in any environment. With a disciplined focus on our organic growth and enterprise initiatives, we expect to continue to outperform our end markets in 2026, while further increasing profitability and margins,” O’Herlihy concluded. First Quarter 2026 Results First quarter revenue of $4.02 billion increased by 4.6 percent. Organic revenue growth was 0.4 percent. Foreign currency translation increased revenue by 3.9 percent and an acquisition  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.02 billion = 40억 2,000만 달러; $1.02 billion = 10억 2,000만 달러; $4.02 = 4.02달러; $2.66 = 2.66달러; $1.02 = 1.02달러; 4.6 percent = 4.6%; 0.4 percent = 0.4%; 3.9 percent = 3.9%; 12 percent = 12%; 0.3 percent = 0.3%; 25.4 percent = 25.4%; 60 basis points = 60포인트.

by a 120-basis point contribution from enterprise initiatives. Operating cash flow was $623 million, and free cash flow was $528 million, a six percent increase representing a 69 percent conversion of net income, in line with seasonal expectations. During the quarter, the company returned capital to shareholders through the repurchase of $375 million of its own shares. The effective tax rate for the quarter was 20.6 percent. 2026 Guidance ITW is raising its full year 2026 GAAP EPS guidance by $0.10 to a range of $11.10 to $11.50 per share, representing eight percent growth at the mid-point. Based on current demand levels and prevailing foreign exchange rates, the company continues to project revenue growth of two to four percent and organic  Normalized numeric aliases: $623 million = 6억 2,300만 달러; $528 million = 5억 2,800만 달러; $375 million = 3억 7,500만 달러; $623 = 623달러; $528 = 528달러; $375 = 375달러; $0.10 = 0.10달러; $11.10 = 11.10달러; 69 percent = 69%; $11.50 = 11.50달러; 20.6 percent = 20.6%.

expansion. Operating margin is projected to reach a range of 26.5 to 27.5 percent, a year-over-year improvement of approximately 100 basis points, driven by an approximate 100-basis point contribution from enterprise initiatives. Free cash flow is projected to exceed 100 percent of net income, and the company expects to repurchase approximately $1.5 billion of its own shares. The projected effective tax rate is in the range of 23 to 24 percent. Non-GAAP Measures This earnings release contains certain non-GAAP financial measures. A reconciliation of these measures to the most directly comparable GAAP measures is included in the attached supplemental reconciliation schedule. The estimated guidance of free cash flow to net income conversion rate is based on assumptions that are difficult to predict, and estimated guidance for the most  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; 27.5 percent = 27.5%; 100 percent = 100%; 24 percent = 24%; 100 basis points = 100포인트.
